title: UC Davis - ELISA Protocol
author: Peter Havel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yibfuan

steps.instruction: Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times. Pipet standards and samples. Incubate.
Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times. Wash plate. Add secondary antibody. Incubate.
Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times. Wash plate. Add substrate. Incubate.
Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times. Add acid.
Read absorbances using a spectrophotometer. Calculate standard curve and unknown values.
Follow kit instructions for preparing standards and all reagents.
